prerequisites: An active Breezy HR account with access to at least one company workspace.
A Breezy HR API credential: either a Personal Access Token (PAT) or an account email and password used to obtain an access token.
The company identifier (company_id) of the Breezy HR company you want to sync, retrieved from the API.

authMethods.name: API key / Personal Access Token (api_key)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with an api_key. Breezy HR is stateless and authenticates via the Authorization bearer token header. You can supply a Personal Access Token (PAT), which is sent as Authorization: breezy_pat_<token>. Alternatively, POST /v3/signin with your email and password to obtain a short-lived access_token used as the bearer token. Both secret fields api_key and company_id are required.

setupSteps.title: Obtain an API access token
setupSteps.body: Authenticate against the Breezy HR API at https://api.breezy.hr/v3. Use a Personal Access Token (PAT) sent as the Authorization bearer token in the form Authorization: breezy_pat_<token>, or call POST /v3/signin with your account email and password to receive an access_token. Use this value for the api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Find your company_id
setupSteps.body: Call GET /v3/companies with your bearer token to list all companies the authenticated user belongs to. Each company object includes an identifier (_id and friendly_id). Use the identifier of the target company for the company_id field. GET /user/details also returns company context keyed by friendly_id for bootstrapping.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the access token or PAT in the required api_key field and the company identifier in the required company_id field. Both fields are secret and required.

sources.title: Breezy HR API - Sign in (POST /v3/signin, returns access_token; PAT as breezy_pat_ bearer token)
Breezy HR API - List companies (GET /v3/companies, returns _id and friendly_id)
